title: DEKTON Mini Garden Reel Cart with 25ft Expandable Hose | Lightweight Hose Reel with 25ft Stretchable Hose | Easy Wind-Up Design | Ideal for Watering Plants, Lawns & Outdoor Cleaning
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Compact & Portable Reel Cart: The Dekton Mini Garden Reel Cart features a compact and lightweight design, making it easy to move around the garden. Its space-saving construction allows for easy storage when not in use.

25ft Expandable Hose: Equipped with a 25ft expandable hose that stretches as water flows and retracts when not in use. This flexible hose expands to reach distant areas while offering a compact size for storage.

Easy Wind-Up Mechanism: The reel cart comes with a simple wind-up design for fast and tangle-free hose storage. The ergonomic handle ensures easy winding, keeping the hose neatly organized after each use.

Durable & Kink-Resistant Hose: The expandable hose is made from durable, high-quality materials designed to resist kinking, ensuring smooth water flow. This reliable hose withstands outdoor elements, providing long-lasting performance.

Versatile for Gardening & Cleaning: Ideal for a variety of tasks, from watering plants and lawns to washing vehicles and outdoor surfaces. The reel cart and hose combo offer a versatile solution for all your watering and cleaning needs.
description: The Dekton Mini Garden Reel Cart with 25ft Expandable Hose is the perfect solution for hassle-free watering and outdoor cleaning. Designed with convenience in mind, this lightweight and portable reel cart allows you to easily maneuver around your garden, making watering plants and cleaning outdoor areas simple and efficient. The 25ft expandable hose stretches to reach far-off areas when in use and retracts to a compact size for easy storage. The easy wind-up mechanism with an ergonomic handle ensures quick, tangle-free hose storage, keeping your garden neat and organized. The durable hose is kink-resistant and built to withstand outdoor conditions, providing smooth water flow and long-lasting reliability. Whether you're watering your garden or washing down surfaces, this versatile hose and reel set makes outdoor tasks effortless. The Dekton Mini Garden Reel Cart is ideal for anyone looking for an efficient, space-saving solution for their watering needs.
